description: Core capability for the main window. The sidecar is spawned from Rust (not over IPC), so no shell permissions are exposed to the webview. `opener:default` lets the webview hand https attachment-download URLs to the system browser — it bundles allow-open-url WITH the default http/https/mailto/tel scope. (allow-open-url alone enables the command but grants no URL scope, so every openUrl is denied.)
